title: TrailList
description: TrailList schema from AWS IAM Access Analyzer API

allOf.description: Specifies the ARN of the trail. The format of a trail ARN is arn:aws:cloudtrail:us-east-2:123456789012:trail/MyTrail.
A list of regions to get CloudTrail data from and analyze to generate a policy.
Possible values are true or false. If set to true, IAM Access Analyzer retrieves CloudTrail data from all regions to analyze and generate a policy.

items.description: Contains details about the CloudTrail trail being analyzed to generate a policy.
